workLog.activity: Audited all 883 .serena/memories files: MD5 exact-dupe hashing, 8-token shingle containment scan (58 near-dup pairs), Explore-agent overlap audit vs .claude/rules and .claude/skills

Removed 65 memory files: 5 corrupt/empty (incl. misnamed adr-021 content moved to empty adr-019 slot), 21 covered by lsp-first.md/AGENTS.md/skills, 37 near-duplicates with content fully contained in kept canonical files

Migrated no-auto-generated-headers preference to universal.md MUST NOT 6 (mirrors regenerated); corrected stale ADR-005 no-Python blocks to ADR-042 in two constraint memories; trimmed usage-mandatory to episodic incidents
Repaired links to renamed memories, updated indexes, reverted 52 unrelated boy-scout link fixes to keep PR under 50-file scope limit; report at .agents/analysis/serena-memory-audit-2026-06-10.md

Addressed 7 Copilot review comments on PR #2555: linked plain-text repo paths in audit report and curation memory per DOCUMENTATION-LINK-REQUIREMENTS.md; removed broken session-109..113 Related links and empty Related section in session/init-003-memory-first-monitoring-gate.md and fixed its memory-relative link prefixes; reworded universal.md MUST NOT 6 to drop the Get-AutoGeneratedHeader implication and regenerated instruction mirrors. memory-index.md entry kept as plain text because memory_index.py rejects out-of-tree link targets (validator authoritative).
